name: Campfire Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a Dutch oven.
2. Saute the onion and garlic until they are tender.
3. Add the potatoes and cook, uncovered, over medium heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the sausage; cook and stir until the potatoes are tender and well browned, about 10 more minutes.
5. Stir in the chilies and corn; cook until heated through.
